column8: details
you are eaten by sharks
you escape the sharks but get the bends, ending your diving career
you dive too deep and your craft is crushed by the pressure
you blast the hatch with your laser causing a flood which sweeps you away and drowns many others
you are bitten by a poisonous sea snake
you quit the expedition and later learn that they went on to discover Atlantis
you are swallowed whole by a gigantic grouper
the Atlanteans disable your sub before you can fire, leaving you unable to ever return
you give up the expedition but later hear a new one is being mounted and are tempted to try again
you are given a set of gills by Atlantean surgeons and you begin a new life living among them
you refuse the offer to become a gilled Atlantean and are housed in a zoo with only a horse to keep you company
you escape the sub with your life but not your sight and have failed in your quest to find Atlantis
your craft is ripped off the boat during a storm, precluding the rest of your expedition
you set off a security system in your attempt to escape that will hold you paralyzed for 23 years and 61 days
you wrestle with the implications for the Atlanteans of alerting the world to their existence and decide to explore space instead
you pretend you will spy for the Nodoors to win your escape, but your real intention is to live out your life among the Atlanteans
you agree to spy for the Nodoors and are rewarded with a prison-like room in their oppressive housing structure
you become an Atlantean farmer, enjoying their peaceful society and soaking up their history
you become the king’s special advisor and are rewarded with riches and the knowledge that you are creating a more equitable society
you hitch a ride to the surface on a whale and are eventually rescued
you join the revolutionaries, planning to escape during the revolt, but get swept up in the fervor and contribute to the bloodless overthrow of the king
you avoid the menacing whale and are whisked back to the surface by a mysterious submarine’s tow line
you suspect your instruments are malfunctioning and decide not to dive to the earth’s core, abandoning your quest in the process
your attempts to blast the hatch open overheat your laser cannon leading to your craft’s disintegration
you attempt to flee the Atlanteans and fall unconscious, eventually awakening in floating in the middle of an empty ocean with no hope of rescue
you blast your way to the surface and climb atop an enormous whale, allowing you to wave down your ship and ensure your safe return
you struggle against the whirlpool and awake with a serious head injury. you hear a helicopter in the distance but it may be too late
you swim up the center of the whirlpool and escape to your ship with an unbelievable story
you decline to become a being of pure energy and instead spend years giving lectures on the details of your society until one day you discover you have been transformed into nothing but light
you join the Atlanteans in becoming an incorporeal being unconstrained by physiology or the bounds of space and time
you become an undersea farmer in the fields outside Atlantis
you become a great musician playing instruments that produce not audible sound but vibrations felt through the water
you tour the underwater lab and have a nice meal with the scientists before being released with a warning never to return
you have stumbled onto a secret military base and will be held as their prisoner for the rest of your life
you are desperate to return to Atlantis and wait out a week-long storm, only to discover when the clouds clear that Atlantis is floating overhead
you enlist with a group of Nodoors attempting escape but are vaporized by the guards’ lasers
after thought-traveling in Atlantis for a millennium you return to Earth and discover a post-industrial eco-utopia
you are offered the chance to return to Earth but would rather remain a thought-traveler forever
you help the Atlanteans beat back the flood waters
you abandon the the Atlanteans as they attempt to stop the flood and escape to your craft in the confusion
you are captured by soldiers and thrown into the king’s dungeon
you escape the soldiers by enlisting the help of a theaterful of bystanders, forming the core of your successful revolt overthrowing the king
